summary: Implemented the official op-backed agent safety commands for secret references, policy checks, metadata audits, env injection planning, sharing preflight, and service-account scope/rate-limit inspection.
reason: The generated local-source skeleton needed a hand-authored non-Connect command layer that calls the official 1Password CLI while redacting values and requiring explicit reveal/write gates.
validated_outcome: go test ./..., full live dogfood, publish validate, and shipcheck all passed.
